title: add varlink bridge
body:
allow the user to define a remote host and remote username for their
remote podman sessions.  this is then feed to the varlink "bridge" as
the ssh credentials and endpoint.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

Code LGTM, but I'd really like to hear why we can't do Debugfs on the remote client - that's going to be very annoying for debugging varlink things...
@mheon ... did you see the part about being asked to turn it off?  it isnt a question of technical nature
Who asked you to turn it off?
